zh.lifeSummary: 當John Adams Lord of Llanllywel於大約1332年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾時，他的父親SIR THOMAS LORD BEVERSTONE KNIGHT ADAMS29歲，母親Lady Jane Inage21歲。他於1377年與Lady Millicent Bessylls在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年在英國格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Adams Lord of Llanllywel于大约1332年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾时，他的父亲SIR THOMAS LORD BEVERSTONE KNIGHT ADAMS29岁，母亲Lady Jane Inage21岁。他于1377年与Lady Millicent Bessylls在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1375年在英国格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Salvatore, Giuseppe, Santo, Giovanna, Nicola, Aldo, Baldassare, Carmelo, Carmino.
Italian: from the personal name Adamo, the Italian form of Adam .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Adams Lord of Llanllywel was born about 1332, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, SIR THOMAS LORD BEVERSTONE KNIGHT ADAMS, was 29 and his mother, Lady Jane Inage, was 21. He married Lady Millicent Bessylls in 1377, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1375, in Charlton, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Adams Lord of Llanllywel est né environ 1332, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, SIR THOMAS LORD BEVERSTONE KNIGHT ADAMS, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Inage, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Millicent Bessylls en 1377, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1375, à Charlton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

Er hat 1377 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Lady Millicent Bessylls geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1375 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Charlton, Gloucestershire, England.

Lui sposato Lady Millicent Bessylls nel 1377, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1375, nel Charlton, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Adams Lord of Llanllywel(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 SIR THOMAS LORD BEVERSTONE KNIGHT ADAMS(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Inage(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Lady Millicent Bessylls(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 영국 그루스스터실르 찰턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Adams Lord of Llanllywel nasceu aproximadamente 1332, em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, SIR THOMAS LORD BEVERSTONE KNIGHT ADAMS, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Inage, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Millicent Bessylls em 1377, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Ashe, Devon, England: аш би аксминстир, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Adams Lord of Llanllywel родился около 1332 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени SIR THOMAS LORD BEVERSTONE KNIGHT ADAMS было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Inage, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Millicent Bessylls в 1377 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1375 г. в местности чарлтон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

Se casó con Lady Millicent Bessylls en 1377, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
